title: Hoyoverse Brainrot Totems
description: Brainrot totems from Hoyoverse games. Honkai Star Rail, Zenless Zone Zero, Genshin Impact. HSR,ZZZ, Evernight
body:
![HOYOBRAINROOOOOT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c59b255abd769a98202ae2179b6410f51015e2f4.png)

# **Description**

This resource pack replaces the Totem of Immortality's default appearance with the Evernight mem from the Honkai Star Rail fan animation. The resource pack also changes the Totem of Immortality's sound effects. 

|Name| Totem |Name| Totem |Name| Totem |
